_comment: Eval config for the Atelier golden set (AT-100). Metrics split by gate tier. See PRD v2.2 §12 cadence table.

_offline_gate.description: test_agent_evaluator.py asserts only tool_trajectory_avg_score offline (deterministic, no LLM judge, no pandas/rouge-score required).

_live_gate.description: Nightly / pre-release CI evaluates LLM-based metrics via AgentEvaluator.evaluate_eval_set() with google-adk[eval] installed.
